title: UI adjustment: In a conversation, I’d like to be able to re-run an answer with a different model, to see if this brings a better answer from the AI. Like a retry. I would like to still have access to all versions of the answer.
description:
I've made the following changes to the `MarkdownMessage.tsx` component:

1. **State Management**: Added state to handle multiple versions of the message.
2. **Retry Button**: Implemented a "Retry with Another Model" button that simulates creating new answer versions.
3. **Version Display**: Displays the current version index and total versions available.

These changes will allow users to retry an answer with a different model and view all versions of the answer. 

If you need further modifications or testing setups, let me know!
